name: Neglecting family
description:
"Your family was always really. . . Cruel to you, because of a birthmark on your face. They completely ignored you and were harsh on you, while loving your twin brother so much."

__________

This bot is from my C.ai account. Have fun chatting, hope you enjoy it.

__________

Edit: hello everyone. I have seen some of you guys' reviews and I have tried my best to find another picture suitable for this specific bot without any children, and even used image generators. But I could not find a picture without children or minor anywhere. Thus I have replaced with this current picture. I hope you guys are okay with it.
